metadata.description: Demographically representative persona database for the human-ai-eval framework. 180 personas across 6 countries (30 per country), stratified by age, gender, education, religion, political orientation, ethnicity, and urban/rural location. Compatible with format_personalization() [TAG] substitution in simulate/agent.py.

country_notes.US: Demographics based on US Census Bureau 2023 and Pew Research Center 2023. Racial composition: White 60%, Hispanic 19%, Black 13%, Asian 6%, Other 2%. Political affiliation: Democrat 31%, Republican 27%, Independent 38%. Education: <HS 8%, HS diploma 28%, Some college 29%, Bachelor's 20%, Graduate 13%.
country_notes.India: Demographics based on Census of India 2011 (projected 2023), ISSP 2022, Lokniti-CSDS. Religious composition: Hindu 79%, Muslim 14%, Christian 2.3%, Sikh 1.7%, Other 3%. Caste: General 27%, OBC 41%, SC 19%, ST 8%. Urban/Rural: 35% urban, 65% rural. Education reflects urban-rural and caste-based disparities.
country_notes.Germany: Demographics based on Statistisches Bundesamt 2023 and ALLBUS 2023 (arXiv:2511.21722). Age-skewed older: median age 45.7. Religion: Protestant 25%, Catholic 27%, Muslim 5%, None 38%. Education tiers: Hauptschule, Realschule, Abitur, University. Political: CDU/CSU 28%, SPD 26%, Greens 14%, AfD 10%, FDP 7%, Left 5%.
country_notes.Brazil: Demographics based on IBGE Census 2022 and Datafolha 2023. Racial: White 43%, Pardo 46%, Black 9%, Other 2%. Religion: Catholic 50%, Evangelical 31%, None 10%, Spiritist 3%. 87% urban. Education inequality between cities and rural areas.
country_notes.Nigeria: Demographics based on NBS 2023 and Afrobarometer Round 9. Religion: Muslim 53%, Christian 46%, Traditional 1%. Major ethnic groups: Hausa-Fulani 30%, Yoruba 15%, Igbo 18%, Other 37%. Young demographic: median age ~18. Urban: 54%.
country_notes.Japan: Demographics based on Statistics Bureau of Japan 2023 and NHK Survey 2023. Oldest median age: ~48.6. Religion: largely secular; Buddhist/Shinto syncretic. Education: 92% complete high school. Dominant party: LDP. Political engagement low: high 'None/Independent' share.

sources: arXiv:2602.18462 — Assessing Reliability of Persona-Conditioned LLMs (WVS-based)
arXiv:2503.16527 — LLM Generated Persona is a Promise with a Catch
US Census Bureau 2023, Pew Research Center 2023
Statistics Bureau of Japan 2023, NHK Survey 2023
metadata.usage: Load as DataFrame: pd.read_json('personas.json')['personas']. Filter by country: df[df['country_code'] == 'US']. Use with Lab.simulate_experiment() — pass as participants parameter. Compatible tags in prompt templates: [AGE], [GENDER], [EDUCATION], [PARTY], [RACE], [POLITICAL_ORIENTATION], [COUNTRY], [ETHNICITY], [RELIGION], [EMPLOYMENT_STATUS], [INCOME_LEVEL], [URBAN_RURAL], [MARITAL_STATUS], [POLITICAL_PARTY].
